description: 医疗健康行业扩展 ontology，覆盖医疗机构、临床业务、药品研发、医疗器械、合规监管和健康数据管理
description_en: Healthcare industry extension covering medical institutions, clinical operations, pharmaceutical R&D, medical devices, regulatory compliance, and health data management

classes.definition: 提供医疗健康服务的机构，含医院、诊所、养老院、第三方检测机构等
classes.definition_en: An institution providing healthcare services, including hospitals, clinics, nursing homes, and third-party labs

classes.definition: 具备住院能力的综合或专科医疗机构
classes.definition_en: A general or specialized medical institution with inpatient capabilities

classes.definition: 按医学专科划分的诊疗部门，如心内科、骨科、肿瘤科等
classes.definition_en: A department organized by medical specialty, e.g., cardiology, orthopedics, oncology

classes.definition: 从事药品研发、生产和销售的企业
classes.definition_en: An enterprise engaged in drug R&D, manufacturing, and commercialization

classes.definition: 经注册审批的治疗性或预防性药物制品
classes.definition_en: A registered therapeutic or prophylactic pharmaceutical product

classes.definition: 用于诊断、治疗或监测的仪器、设备和耗材
classes.definition_en: Instruments, equipment, and consumables used for diagnosis, treatment, or monitoring

classes.definition: 在人体上验证药物或医疗器械安全性和有效性的系统性研究
classes.definition_en: A systematic study to evaluate safety and efficacy of drugs or devices in human subjects

classes.definition: 接受医疗服务的个人角色
classes.definition_en: An individual role receiving healthcare services

classes.definition: 具有执业资格的诊疗医生
classes.definition_en: A licensed medical practitioner providing diagnosis and treatment

classes.definition: 提供护理服务和患者照护的临床角色
classes.definition_en: A clinical role providing nursing care and patient support

classes.definition: 设计和执行临床试验的研究角色
classes.definition_en: A research role designing and conducting clinical trials

classes.definition: 基于症状、检查和化验结果确定的疾病判定
classes.definition_en: Disease determination based on symptoms, examinations, and lab results

classes.definition: 医师为患者开具的用药指示
classes.definition_en: Medication instructions issued by a physician for a patient

classes.definition: 患者诊疗信息的数字化系统性记录，含病历、检查、用药和手术记录
classes.definition_en: Digitized systematic record of patient care including history, exams, medications, and procedures

classes.definition: 规范临床试验设计、执行和数据收集的标准文件
classes.definition_en: Standard document defining clinical trial design, execution, and data collection

classes.definition: 向药品或医疗器械监管机构提交的审批申请材料
classes.definition_en: Application materials submitted to drug or device regulatory authorities for approval

classes.definition: 因诊疗失误、感染控制不当或药物不良反应导致的患者伤害风险
classes.definition_en: Risk of patient harm due to medical errors, infection control failures, or adverse drug reactions

classes.definition: 患者健康数据泄露或不当使用的隐私合规风险
classes.definition_en: Privacy compliance risk from health data breaches or inappropriate use of patient data

classes.definition: 药品生产质量管理规范，确保药品安全、有效和质量可控
classes.definition_en: Quality management standards for pharmaceutical manufacturing ensuring drug safety, efficacy, and quality

classes.definition: 保护患者健康信息隐私和安全的合规政策（如 HIPAA、GDPR 健康条款）
classes.definition_en: Compliance policy protecting patient health information privacy and security (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR health provisions)

classes.definition: 从挂号、问诊、检查、诊断到治疗的端到端诊疗流程
classes.definition_en: End-to-end care process from registration, consultation, examination, diagnosis to treatment

classes.definition: 从靶点发现、临床前研究、临床试验到上市申请的全链路研发流程
classes.definition_en: Full pipeline from target discovery, preclinical, clinical trials to NDA submission

classes.definition: 利用信息技术优化临床决策、病历管理和患者沟通的能力
classes.definition_en: Capability to leverage IT for clinical decision support, medical records, and patient communication

classes.definition: 管理医院行政、临床和财务业务的综合信息系统
classes.definition_en: Integrated information system managing hospital administrative, clinical, and financial operations

classes.definition: 管理检验科样本处理、结果记录和报告的信息系统
classes.definition_en: Information system managing lab sample processing, result recording, and reporting

classes.definition: 实际使用床位数占开放床位总数的比率
classes.definition_en: Ratio of occupied beds to total available beds

classes.definition: 出院后一定期间内非计划再入院的患者比率
classes.definition_en: Rate of unplanned readmissions within a defined period after discharge

classes.definition: 临床试验达到主要终点的成功比率，按阶段（I/II/III）统计
classes.definition_en: Rate of clinical trials meeting primary endpoints, tracked by phase (I/II/III)

relations.definition: 诊断记录于电子健康档案
relations.definition_en: A diagnosis is documented in the electronic health record
A clinical trial is conducted under a clinical protocol
A pharmaceutical company develops a drug product
A drug product is submitted for regulatory approval

relations.definition: 电子病历在 HIS 系统中管理
relations.definition_en: Electronic health records are managed in the HIS

relations.definition: 检验结果在 LIS 系统中记录
relations.definition_en: Lab results are recorded in the LIS

relations.definition: 药品生产遵循 GMP 规范
relations.definition_en: Drug manufacturing complies with GMP policy
